Born and raised on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], '''Eryk Kroogar''', also known as '''Talonscar''', was one of millions of young [[Gender/Legends|men]] who found inspiration and guidance in the exploits of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], the most famous Corellian of his time.

==Biography==
In an attempt to emulate his hero, Eryk 'Talonscar' Kroogar (so named for a run-in with a [[Corellian sand panther/Legends|Corellian sand panther]]) immersed himself in the seedier side of Corellia and became a pirate and smuggler. In a desperate attempt to scrounge up enough collateral to buy his own ship, he took a series of ludicrously risky freelance jobs.<ref name="CatCW" />
